hero.tagline: Technical SEO Consultant & Full-Stack Engineer in Mexico

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Engineering & technical SEO solutions to scale your digital business
services.step1Desc: Deep technical analysis of your site, performance, SEO, and improvement opportunities.
services.step2Desc: Architecture definition, priorities, and roadmap with clear deliverables.
services.step3Desc: Iterative development with sprints, code reviews, and continuous QA.
services.step4Desc: Metrics tracking, Core Web Vitals, rankings, and conversions.

seoTecnico.title: Technical SEO Consultant in Mexico
